extensionDescription.message: Click once. Every work tab falls into place.

smartOrganizeCopy.message: Create native groups and open the sidebar.

verticalTabsCopy.message: Browse and switch tabs from the sidebar.

chatWithCurrentPageCopy.message: Open the Agent on the active tab.

tabAgentWelcome.message: Ask me about this tab, organize tabs, move the current tab, or rename groups.

tabAgentPrivacyHint.message: I only read page text after you ask and confirm when the page looks sensitive.

sidebarWelcomeBody.message:
- Start with **Smart Organize** to create native Chrome tab groups across your normal windows.
- Ask about the **current page** when you want page context.
- Set up AI when you want DeepSeek, OpenAI-compatible, or local model answers.

privacyBulletMetadata.message: Reads tab title, hostname, path, and tab state.

privacyBulletBody.message: Does not read page body unless you ask for summary later.

privacyBulletDuplicates.message: Safe exact/tracking duplicates may be closed, with Restore available.

privacyBulletProtected.message: Active, pinned, audible, incognito, and internal tabs are protected.

chatAssistantCopy.message: Ask TabMosaic to move tabs, rename groups, or summarize the current page.

chatPlaceholder.message: Ask about this tab or your tabs...

composerChipLinkTitle.message: Pasted link. The page is not fetched unless you choose that flow.

pickerCurrentPageCopy.message: Ask from visible text on this tab.

pickerPageRegionCopy.message: Select one visible section as context.

pickerVisibleScreenshotCopy.message: Ask from a visible screenshot with a vision model.

pickerSelectedTabsCopy.message: Read up to 6 pages in this scope.

pickerSelectedTabsUnavailable.message: Select tabs or a group in Dashboard first.

pickerSelectedTabsPrompt.message: Summarize this selected tab context and suggest next steps.

pickerSearchWebCopy.message: Use the configured Agent search tool.

pickerDecisionBriefCopy.message: Compare this scope and recommend a path.

pickerDecisionBriefPrompt.message: Create a decision brief from this context with recommendation, tradeoffs, missing information, and sources.

pickerResearchBriefPrompt.message: Create a research brief from this context with findings, contradictions, gaps, next steps, and source notes.

pickerSaveTodoCopy.message: Create a local task from this context.

templateCleanupTabsCopy.message: Organize and close only safe dupes.

templateCleanupTabsPrompt.message: Clean up my tabs by task, close only safe duplicates after confirmation, and show anything that needs review.

templateFindDuplicatesPrompt.message: What duplicate tabs are safe to close, and what duplicates need review?

templateReviewPagePrompt.message: Review this page. Summarize the important points, risks, and concrete next steps.

templateVisualReviewPrompt.message: Analyze the visible screenshot. Tell me what matters, what looks risky, and what I should do next.

templateDraftResponseCopy.message: Write a copy-only reply from this page.

templateDraftResponsePrompt.message: Draft a concise copy-only response from this page. Do not submit, send, or edit the page.

templateRewriteSelectionPrompt.message: Rewrite the selected text so it is clearer and ready to copy. Do not insert, submit, send, or edit the page.

templateSmartFillCopy.message: Extract rows from a selected page region.

templateSmartFillPrompt.message: Extract the selected page region into a copy-only Markdown table. Classify rows and suggest next actions. Do not fill forms or edit the page.

templateCompareTabsPrompt.message: Compare these selected tabs. Give me a table, recommendation, tradeoffs, and source notes.

templateDecisionBriefPrompt.message: Create a decision brief from this context with recommendation, tradeoffs, missing information, and sources.

templateResearchBriefPrompt.message: Create a research brief from these selected sources. Include findings, contradictions, gaps, next steps, and source notes. Do not claim web search unless I ask you to research missing info.

templateDraftFromTabsCopy.message: Write copy-only text from selected tabs.

templateDraftFromTabsPrompt.message: Draft a concise project update from these selected tabs. Do not insert, submit, send, or edit any page.

templateTranslateSelectionPrompt.message: Translate this selected text between English and Chinese, then explain key terms simply.

templateCreateTodoPrompt.message: Create a clear local todo from this context with the next action and linked tabs.

verticalTabsDescription.message: Browse tabs by window and group.

classificationRefinementNote.message: Metadata-only suggestions. Type `preview refinements` to review an Apply-gated regrouping plan.

classificationRefinementReason.message: Metadata suggests this group may be too broad.

classificationMergeReason.message: Metadata suggests these groups may belong together.

summaryDescription.message: Reads visible text from the active page only after you ask from the composer.

nextBuildCopy.message: Run real Chrome QA with multi-window work tabs.

clickIconToOrganize.message: Click the extension icon to organize your tabs.

reviewBasics.message: Review the basics, then start organizing.

nothingChangedOnError.message: No tabs were moved or closed.

errorNextStepHint.message: Try Organize Again. If it repeats, open Dashboard and copy the redacted diagnostic snapshot.

checkingSummaryPrivacyCopy.message: Checking the active page before reading visible text...

sensitiveSummaryConfirm.message: This page may contain sensitive information ($1). Read visible text from this page now?

extractingVisibleText.message: Extracting visible text from the active page...

readingSelectedTextCopy.message: Using highlighted text from the active page only...

selectingPageRegionCopy.message: Click one visible section on the active page. Press Esc to cancel.

capturingVisibleScreenshotCopy.message: Using the current visible browser area only. Screenshot context requires a vision-capable model.

pageCouldNotBeRead.message: The page could not be read.

tryChatExamples.message: Try: GitHub PR to Code Review, current tab to Reading, or rename Misc to Reading.

readingContextTabsCopy.message: Reading visible text from up to 6 tabs in this context...

regroupingContextTabsCopy.message: Reading visible text and building a regrouping preview...

decidingFromSavedSources.message: Building a decision brief from saved local sources...

researchingSavedSources.message: Building a research brief from saved local sources...

savedSourcesNoSources.message: I could not find saved sources or memos to use yet. Save a memo, source, or collection first, then ask again.

decidingFromSearchResults.message: Building a decision brief from the current search results...

searchResultsNoSources.message: I could not find session search results to use yet. Run Agent Search first, then ask again.

searchResultsDecisionDefaultQuestion.message: Create a decision brief from these search results.

contextTabsNoContext.message: Select a group in Dashboard or ask from a group context first.

modelRouteMetadataCopy.message: Uses titles, hostnames, paths, and tab state. Local or cheaper models are a good fit.

modelRoutePageAgentCopy.message: Uses visible page text only after you submit. It goes to your configured chat model.

modelRouteContextTabsCopy.message: Reads up to 6 visible pages after you ask, then uses your configured chat model.

modelRoutePageRegionCopy.message: Uses one clicked region after submit. A vision-capable model can also use the cropped region image.

modelRouteVisionCopy.message: Captures one visible screenshot after submit and sends it only to a vision-capable configured model.

modelRouteSelectedTextCopy.message: Uses highlighted text only after submit and sends it to your configured chat model.

modelRouteSearchToolCopy.message: Sends only your typed query to the configured search provider after submit.

runLogUnavailable.message: This run log is no longer available.

runLogUndoNotNeeded.message: Undo was not needed because no browser change was applied.

runLogBrowserChanged.message: A browser change was applied after user confirmation.

couldNotBuildSafeAction.message: I could not turn that into a safe tab action yet.

agentAIAnswerFailed.message: I could not get an AI tab answer this time: $1

agentCommandSelectRegion.message: I'll use one selected page region.

agentCommandAskPage.message: I'll answer from the current page.

agentCommandUndo.message: I'll undo the last reversible action.

agentWorkspaceSaved.message: Saved “$1” locally. Restore and workspace chat come later.

agentTodoStoredLocally.message: Stored locally with tab metadata only. Page text and full URLs were not saved.

agentTodoOpenDashboardHint.message: You can review it in the Dashboard Work Queue.

agentTodoNoContext.message: I could not find an open tab in this context to turn into a todo.

agentTodoNoOpenTodo.message: I could not find an open local todo to update.

agentTodoUpdatedLocally.message: Saved locally in Work Queue. I only changed the local todo text/checklist; no page text, full URLs, or cloud storage were used.

agentTodoRenameMissing.message: Tell me the new todo title, for example: `rename todo to Review launch plan`.

agentTodoTargetNoMatch.message: I could not find a local todo matching “$1”.

agentTodoTargetAmbiguous.message: I found multiple local todos matching “$1”.

agentTodoTargetAmbiguousHint.message: Tell me the exact todo name, for example: `add checklist item to "Review launch plan" todo: confirm copy`.

agentTodoChecklistItemMissing.message: Tell me the checklist item to add, for example: `add checklist item: confirm pricing copy`.

agentTodoChecklistItemNotFound.message: I could not match a checklist item. Try `mark first checklist item done` or `done: final QA`.

agentTodoContextMerged.message: Merged the current context into this todo: $1 new linked tabs.

agentTodoContextMergeNoNewTabs.message: The current context was already linked to this todo.

noLocalSourcesForSteps.message: No local sources matched this todo yet.

noNewSuggestedSteps.message: No new suggested steps to add.

agentTodoReadingPage.message: Reading the current page to create a checklist todo...

agentTodoCreatingChecklist.message: Turning the page into a local checklist todo...

agentTodoChecklistStoredLocally.message: Saved locally in Work Queue. I read visible page text only for this user-requested action; full URLs and cloud storage were not used.

agentTodoFallbackChecklist.message: Review this page and decide the next action.

agentTodoSourceStoredLocally.message: Saved locally in Work Queue. Only the source title, site, path, and snippet were stored.

writingDraftCopied.message: Draft copied. Review it before sending.

writingDraftUnavailable.message: That draft is no longer available in this chat session.

smartFillTableCopied.message: Table copied. Review it before using it elsewhere.

smartFillCsvCopied.message: CSV copied. Review it before importing it elsewhere.

smartFillTableUnavailable.message: That extracted table is no longer available in this chat session.

smartFillUnavailable.message: That Smart Fill result is no longer available in this chat session.

memoUnavailable.message: That memo is no longer available in this chat session.

memoSavedBoundary.message: Stored locally. I saved the assistant answer, source labels, tags, provider label, and linked tab/source metadata only.

memoSearchHint.message: You can find it later from the sidebar with `find ...`.

browserWorkSourceUnavailable.message: That source is no longer available in this chat session.

agentLinkDetected.message: I found 1 link in your message.

agentLinksDetected.message: I found $1 links in your message.

agentLinksNoFetch.message: I did not open or fetch the page. You can save the link, turn it into a todo, or fetch it after Chrome asks for that site.

agentNoRunYet.message: I do not have an organize result yet. Click Organize Again first.

agentChatNeedsOrganize.message: I can chat about your tabs after I have a browser context. Click Organize Again first; then ask things like “what changed?”, “show groups”, or “which tabs should I focus on?”

agentChatNeedsAI.message: I can answer wired tab questions locally. For open-ended AI conversation, connect a BYOK AI provider and run organize once so I have tab context. I still will not read page text or send full URLs unless you ask for page content.

agentChatFallbackAnswer.message: I can help with tab-specific questions after an organize run: ask about groups, duplicates, next steps, memory relief, a tab search, or the current page. Freer AI conversation needs a connected BYOK AI provider.

agentWebSearchNeedsProvider.message: Search is an Agent tool, not a browser search page. To search for “$1”, connect a Tavily-style provider first. I will send only the typed query by default, not your open tabs or page text.

agentWebSearchUnsupportedProvider.message: $1 is not supported for the search tool yet. Tavily is the recommended first adapter.

agentWebSearchFailed.message: The search tool did not finish: $1

agentWebSearchResultsFound.message: I found $1 web results. Here are the most relevant ones.

agentWebSearchNoResults.message: I could not find useful web results for this query.

researchAddendumChecked.message: I checked the missing question with the Search Tool: $1

researchAddendumCheckedMultiple.message: I checked $1 focused Search Tool queries:

researchAddendumExternalSignal.message: - Strongest outside signal: $1. Use it to validate: $2.

researchAddendumExternalContext.message: - The strongest outside signal is $1. Treat it as external context, not as page text I already opened.

researchAddendumNoSignals.message: - I did not get enough source signals to close the gap yet.

researchAddendumKeepsBoundary.message: - This does not replace the selected-tab brief; it adds outside context around: $1.

researchAddendumBoundary.message: Boundary: this used $1 titles, hostnames, snippets, and optional provider summary only. I did not open source pages or send selected-tab page text to search.

agentWebSearchSettingsCopy.message: Add a provider-backed search tool for Agent answers. It does not open a browser search page.

agentWebSearchProviderCopy.message: Tavily is the first supported search tool adapter.

searchToolBoundary.message: The Agent receives sources in chat. A browser tab opens only if you click a source.

searchApiKeyCopy.message: Required for Tavily. Stored locally and never sent to TabMosaic.

searchBaseUrlCopy.message: Custom HTTPS search hosts ask for provider-origin permission.

maxResultsCopy.message: Keep this small so answers stay focused.

clearSearchKeyConfirm.message: Clear the stored search API key from this browser?

searchDiagnosticPrivacy.message: Sent query: $1; tabs: $2; page text: $3; full URLs: $4.

searchDiagnosticDashboardPrivacy.message: Diagnostics store status only. They do not store your query, API key, source URLs, tab titles, page text, or result bodies.

webSearchOpenedResult.message: Opened the search result in a new tab.

webSearchOpenFailed.message: Could not open this search result.

agentCapabilitiesAnswer.message: I can organize your tabs, explain what changed, show groups and duplicates, save the workspace locally, restore closed duplicates, find/open a tab, summarize or answer the current page after you ask from the composer, and preview safe changes like “GitHub PR to Code Review”. Page text is read only after your current-tab chat request.

agentNextStepReview.message: Next: review $1 duplicate groups first. Ask “what needs review” to see them. I will not close those tabs unless you confirm.

agentNextStepRestore.message: Next: scan the new groups, then use Restore Closed if anything looks wrong. You can ask “what did you close” before restoring.

agentNextStepGroups.message: Next: use the new groups: $1. You can ask me to find a tab, summarize the current page, or open Dashboard to adjust groups.

agentNextStepNoGroups.message: Next: I do not see useful groups yet. Try Organize Again after opening more work tabs, or teach me a rule like “GitHub PR to Code Review”.

agentOverviewAnswer.message: I created $1 groups, moved $2 tabs, closed $3 safe duplicates, and left $4 duplicate groups for review. $5

agentOptimizationAnswer.message: Optimization result: $1 groups, $2 tabs organized, $3 safe duplicate tabs closed, and $4 duplicate groups left for review. Memory relief is counted as $5 duplicate tabs freed; Chrome does not expose exact per-tab MB here, so I will not invent a memory number. $6

agentOverviewNoGroups.message: No groups were created in this run.

agentGroupsEmpty.message: No native groups are available in the latest result.

agentDuplicatesNone.message: I did not find duplicate groups that need attention in the latest result.

agentDuplicatesAnswer.message: I closed $1 safe duplicate tabs and left $2 duplicate groups for review. Restore Closed is $3.

agentReviewDuplicatesNone.message: Nothing is waiting for duplicate review in the latest result.

agentReviewDuplicatesAnswer.message: Review queue: $1 duplicate groups need a look: $2. I will not close them unless you confirm a tab.

agentReviewDuplicatesAnswerMore.message: Review queue: $1 duplicate groups need a look: $2, plus $3 more. I will not close them unless you confirm a tab.

agentClosedTabsNone.message: I do not see closed duplicate tabs available in the latest result.

agentClosedTabsAnswerMore.message: Closed duplicates available to restore: $1. Examples: $2, plus $3 more.

agentClosedTabsCountOnly.message: I closed $1 duplicate tabs in this result. Restore Closed is $2.

agentClosedTabsRestored.message: Restore Closed already reopened $1 tabs. $2 failed.

agentAIStatusApplied.message: Your AI provider helped classify this run and suggested $1 AI groups.

agentAIStatusFallback.message: AI was not used successfully this time, so I fell back to local rules.

agentAIStatusEmpty.message: AI returned no usable groups, so I used local rules.

agentAIStatusLocal.message: AI classification is not active for this run. I used local and built-in rules.

browserWorkSearchNoResults.message: I could not find a local match for "$1".

browserWorkSearchBoundary.message: I searched local tabs, groups, todos, memos, collections, workspaces, tab states, and duplicate review only. I did not read page text, full URLs, history, bookmarks, or the web.

workBriefIntro.message: Here is the cleanest place to continue.

workBriefInferredGoalStep.message: Likely local goal: **$1**. Say `set goal: $1` if you want me to keep using it.

workBriefDuplicateStep.message: Review duplicate candidates first: $1. That keeps the browser safe before you continue.

workBriefWorkspaceStep.message: You also have a saved workspace to resume: **$1**.

workBriefCollectionStep.message: Use saved collection **$1** if you need source material.

workBriefMemoStep.message: Reuse saved memo **$1** if you need prior AI context.

workBriefCurrentTabStep.message: Or continue from the current tab: **$1**.

workBriefAskCommand.message: Useful next commands: `find ...`, `save this tab for later`, or `make these tabs a todo`.

workspaceChatNoContext.message: I do not have enough local workspace context yet. Start with Smart Organize, save a memo, or create a Work Queue item.

workspaceChatBoundary.message: I used local tabs, groups, todos, memos, collections, saved workspaces, tab states, and duplicate review only. I did not read page text, full URLs, history, bookmarks, screenshots, the web, or cloud storage.

workspaceChatInferredGoalHint.message: Inferred from local work only. Say `set goal: $1` to save it.

completedAgentReply.message:
Done. I cleaned up the browser into clearer work groups and left protected tabs untouched.

**Result**
- Groups: $1
- Tabs organized: $2
- Memory relief: $4 duplicate tabs
- Needs review: $5 possible duplicate groups
$6
$7

You can type `undo`, `restore closed`, or `organize again` if you want me to adjust it.

ollamaSetupStepOne.message: Start Ollama locally and pull a chat model, for example: ollama pull llama3.1.

ollamaSetupStepTwo.message: Keep Ollama running so http://localhost:11434/v1 is available.

ollamaSetupStepThree.message: Click Test AI Connection before enabling AI classification.

lmStudioSetupStepOne.message: Open LM Studio, download a chat model, and load it.

lmStudioSetupStepTwo.message: Enable the Local Server with OpenAI-compatible mode on port 1234.

lmStudioSetupStepThree.message: Click Test AI Connection before enabling AI classification.

localModelSetupNote.message: Local model setup stays on this device. TabMosaic still sends only the same minimized metadata unless you ask for page content.

aiBaseUrlBetaLimit.message: Supports HTTPS OpenAI-compatible endpoints and http://localhost local models. Custom hosts ask for provider-origin permission before use.

modelSuggestionsCopy.message: Test AI Connection can fill suggestions from the provider's model list.

providerDetailsCopy.message: DeepSeek by default; custom OpenAI-compatible and local endpoints are supported.

apiKeySavedPlaceholder.message: API key saved locally. Leave blank to keep it.

apiKeyOptionalLocal.message: Required for remote providers. Optional for local endpoints that do not use auth.

clearAIKeyConfirm.message:
Clear the locally saved AI API key on this device?

This disables AI classification until you save a key again. It does not move or close tabs.

aiKeyCleared.message: AI key cleared locally. Local rules remain active.

testingAIConnection.message: Testing AI provider without sending tab data...

aiTroubleshootLocalServer.message: make sure the local OpenAI-compatible server is running

aiTroubleshootChooseListedModel.message: choose one of the listed model suggestions or edit the model name

aiTroubleshootCheckModelName.message: check that the configured model name exactly matches the provider model ID

aiTroubleshootSyntheticOnly.message: this provider did not expose /models, so the synthetic ping only checked chat completion

aiTroubleshootAddRemoteKey.message: enter your provider API key before testing a remote endpoint

aiTroubleshootUseHttps.message: use HTTPS for remote providers or http://localhost for local models

unsupportedAIBaseUrl.message: Use an HTTPS OpenAI-compatible Base URL, or http://localhost for a local model endpoint. Do not include username, password, query string, or hash.

aiProviderPermissionDenied.message: Chrome permission was not granted for $1, so this AI provider was not enabled.

permissionsIntro.message: TabMosaic uses a small permission set for one-click grouping, undo, restore, dashboard state, and user-triggered current-page summary.

permissionTabsCopy.message: Reads tab title, hostname, path, and state so it can organize all normal windows and restore safe duplicates.

permissionTabGroupsCopy.message: Creates and updates real Chrome native tab groups.

permissionSidePanelCopy.message: Opens the sidebar control center after the toolbar click.

permissionStorageCopy.message: Stores local settings, rules, saved workspace snapshots, Undo/Restore snapshots, and the optional local API key.

permissionScriptingCopy.message: Reads visible text only from the active page after you ask from the sidebar composer.

permissionOptionalSitesCopy.message: Optional site access is requested only for the specific sites in a user-triggered group or selected-tabs page question, then released after the answer.

permissionDeepSeekCopy.message: Used only when you enable a BYOK AI provider. Custom hosts are requested explicitly before testing or saving.

permissionsNotRequested.message: Not granted by default: all URLs. Never requested: history, bookmarks, cookies, webRequest, browsingData, or incognito access.

localDataDescription.message: Clears local rules, saved workspace snapshots, API key, recent results, Undo/Restore snapshots, chat drafts, and first-run privacy acceptance.

openSidePanelToPopulateDashboard.message: Open the side panel and organize tabs to populate the dashboard.

couldNotUndo.message: Could not undo the latest browser changes.

couldNotRestoreClosed.message: Could not restore closed duplicate tabs.

couldNotApplyGroupUpdate.message: Could not apply this group update.

refineSelectedTabsPrompt.message: Regroup these selected tabs by actual page content.

selectedTabsWindowReset.message: Selection moved to this window. Cross-window chat stays separate in this beta.

restoreWorkspaceConfirm.message:
Restore this local workspace snapshot?

TabMosaic will regroup only tabs that are still open on this device. It will not reopen closed pages, close tabs, or upload page content.

workspaceRestoredMeta.message: Restored $1 open tabs into $2 groups. $3 saved tabs skipped.

couldNotRestoreWorkspace.message: Could not restore this workspace snapshot.

deleteWorkspaceConfirm.message:
Delete this local workspace snapshot?

This removes only the saved snapshot on this device. It does not restore, close, or move tabs.

couldNotDeleteWorkspace.message: Could not delete this workspace snapshot.

savedWorkspacesCopy.message: Local snapshots only. Restore currently open tabs; cloud sync and workspace chat come later.

localRulesActiveUntilKey.message: Local rules are active until you save an API key and enable AI.

diagnosticsDescription.message: Copies a redacted local QA snapshot and recent local error summary for bug reports. It excludes URLs, hostnames, tab titles, page text, and API keys.

clearLocalDataConfirm.message:
Clear TabMosaic local data on this device?

This removes saved rules, saved workspace snapshots, API key, recent results, Undo/Restore snapshots, chat drafts, and first-run privacy acceptance. It does not close or move tabs.

noNativeGroupsLatest.message: No native groups were created in the latest run.

noDuplicateCandidatesLatest.message: No duplicate candidates in the latest run.

noLocalRulesYet.message: No local rules yet. Create one from sidebar chat refine.

classificationRuleBoundary.message: Uses title, host, and path metadata to suggest grouping. It does not read page text.

protectRuleBoundary.message: Keeps matching tabs out of auto-move and auto-close flows. It does not read or upload page content.

rulesLocalSafetyCopy.message: These rules are stored on this device. They use tab metadata only and do not read, upload, move, or close pages by themselves.

rulePatternRequired.message: Add a domain or URL pattern.

protectedRuleEditBlocked.message: Protected rules can be enabled, disabled, or deleted here. Edit protection from Sidebar.

deleteRuleConfirm.message:
Delete this local rule?

Future organize runs will stop applying it. This does not move or close tabs.

noWebsiteUpload.message: No website data is uploaded by default.

dashboardSmartGroupsCopy.message: Groups mirror the latest native Chrome tab groups and can apply title, color, and same-window tab moves back to the browser.

dashboardDuplicateCopy.message: Safe duplicates and review candidates from the latest organize run.

rulesMemoryCopy.message: Local correction rules created from chat refine and dashboard edits.

settingsPageCopy.message: AI classification and local privacy controls.

dashboardErrorNextStep.message: Use Organize Browser to retry, or copy diagnostics from Settings if the problem repeats.

groupTabsPending.message: Tab rows will appear after the next organize or refresh.

aiClassificationCopy.message: Use your own OpenAI-compatible provider for tab grouping and Agent answers. TabMosaic sends minimized tab metadata plus short sanitized chat context, not page text or full URLs.

permissionsAdvancedCopy.message: Required browser permissions and what they support.

diagnosticsAdvancedCopy.message: Copy redacted local QA data only when you need to report a bug.

localDataAdvancedCopy.message: Clear local state if you want to reset the extension on this device.
